scope: wave1 fan-out migration: the 4 legacy-parity read streams (calls, agents, teams, numbers) and legacy's single token-header auth mode are fully migrated. The broader Freshcaller API surface (call metrics, IVR/call routing config, business hours, holiday lists, webhooks) remains out of scope until Pass B.

excluded.reason: /api/v1/call_metrics is a reporting/analytics/query surface with endpoint-specific parameters; this bundle does not declare a stable collection schema and fixture for it
/api/v1/ivrs is an additional documented read resource not implemented by legacy; this bundle does not declare its stream schema, pagination contract, or fixtures
/api/v1/business_calendars is an additional documented read resource not implemented by legacy; this bundle does not declare its stream schema, pagination contract, or fixtures
mutates call records; not a syncable read
